stepTitle: Write a regex pattern that correctly fills the blank (v) to create the Day column. For example, your chosen regex pattern should extract the text "Monday" from this text: "D(100) Hoopers played during the Fall $$2025$$ semester on Monday"
stepBody: Jake creates a new Day column with the day of the week that each team played. Jake writes the shown skeleton code.\n\nAssumptions: IM basketball does not happen during the summer semester. No team name contains the words Spring or Fall. All entries in the Team Description column follow the format below: {$$Team_{Name}$$} played during the {$$\frac{Fall}{Spring}$$} {Year} semester on {Day}.##figure1.gif##
